interface.longDescription: Analyze your brand’s AI presence and reputation. The Conductor app gives enterprise teams instant access to trusted AI search intelligence directly within ChatGPT. Evaluate brand presence and sentiment, track competitive market share, and identify top mentions and citations in real-time. Designed for the entire enterprise—from Digital Marketing and Content teams to PR and Leadership—to empower faster, smarter decision making and fuel powerful agentic workflows.
defaultPrompt: Who are top competitors for “wireless earbuds”
